'''Ioth''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] agent.

==Biography==
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Ioth was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] working in [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence's]] [[Analysis (Alliance Intelligence)|Analysis]] branch. His [[Species/Legends|species]] had an affinity for reading data faster than [[Human/Legends|Humans]], and were able to digest numbers with the efficiency of a [[Computer/Legends|computer]], but the ability to interpret data with the mind of a living being. He was assigned to the [[Navy Supply]] division, and during a session processing [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] supply requisitions for the preceding eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] made a note that the [[Oplovis Sector Fleet]] had seen a jump in requisitions for 4.1 percent. He noted the information for further analysis by other analysts.<ref name="RASB" />
